inputs.label: EBIT (Earnings Before Interest and Taxes)
inputs.businessContext: Net operating profit before interest and taxes.

label_i18n.es: EBIT (Ganancias antes de intereses e impuestos)

businessContext_i18n.en: Net operating profit before interest and taxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Faiz ve vergi öncesi net faaliyet karıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nettoergebnis aus der Betriebstätigkeit vor Zinsen und Steuern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bénéfice net d'exploitation avant intérêts et impôts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Utilidad operativa neta antes de intereses e impuestos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: صافي الربح التشغيلي قبل الفوائد والضرائب.

inputs.label: Toplam Borç
inputs.businessContext: Total short-term and long-term debts of the company.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total short-term and long-term debts of the company.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şirketin toplam kısa ve uzun vadeli borçları.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte kurzfristige und langfristige Verbindlichkeiten des Unternehmens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dettes totales à court et long terme de l'entreprise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Deuda total de la empresa a corto y largo plazo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي ديون الشركة قصيرة وطويلة الأجل.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Capitaux propres appartenant aux actionnaires de l'entreprise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Patrimonio neto de los accionistas de la empresa.

inputs.label: Nakit ve Nakit Benzerleri
inputs.businessContext: Cash and liquid assets in the cash register.

businessContext_i18n.es: Efectivo y activos líquidos en caja.
